human_verification.notes: Reviewed validated readiness for planning-phase behavior, apparel-specific planning records, compliance boundaries, functionality coverage, and runtime-specification-based posture.

specialist_owned_evidence: Manifest enforces recommendation-only planning boundaries for assortment, schedule, and allocation decisions with explicit routing to buying, pricing, vendor-compliance, sourcing, product-compliance, and store-operations lanes.

Authoritative sources cover named-industry workflow, retail cadence, item-variant normalization, floor-ready execution, inventory visibility, and compliance-control boundaries rather than only one dimension.
Functionality map covers all required shared, planning-scheduling-and-allocation, and cross-industry abilities with scenario coverage for every scenario in evaluation results.
Research summary maps workflow stages, artifacts, systems of record, decision boundaries, domain failure modes, and required scenario families to this apparel merchandise-planning lane.

review_notes: No functional or evidence blockers remain for this package draft.

All required scenario families and escalation families are represented, including demand overflow, conflicting priorities, final approval refusal, compliance-gap escalation, adjacent-lane routing, and tenant adaptation.

notes: validated conditions met for recommendation-only apparel merchandise-planning specialist.
Runtime remains specification-based and must be promoted to a retained implementation only through separate governance and commit history.
